name: Oriental Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Diced Cooked Poultry or Pork
2 oz Jar Pimento, sliced or diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice mushrooms and onions.
2. Drain pimento.
3. Add enough water to the broth to make 2 1/2 cups.
4. Bring to a boil in a medium saucepan.
5. Stir in rice. Cover tightly and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and let stand, covered, until all liquid is absorbed; about 5 minutes.
7. Transfer rice to a large bowl.
8. Combine oil, soy sauce, salt, and sesame seeds (optional) in a separate bowl. Mix well.
9. Stir into hot, cooked rice.
10. Cover and chill.
11. Stir in remaining ingredients before serving.
